productDisplayName: Mark Taylor Men Printed Green Tshirts
description: Composition Bottle green T-shirt made of 50% polyester and 50% cotton, has a ribbed crew neckline, short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water with like colours, using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Cool iron; do not iron on print/embroidery A bottle green T-shirt with graphic lettering from mark taylor makes for a great casual wear.
